Clone the tensorflow/models repository from GitHub
Import TensorFlow, Keras, and other required modules in a new Python script
Define batch size as 2 and image dimensions as (321, 321, 3)
Create random uniform input data with shape (batch_size, height, width, channels)
Initialize the Delg model from delf/python/training/model/delg_model.py with default parameters
Call the Delg model's train_step method with randomly generated labels and images
Set a learning rate of 0.001 for the optimizer
Monitor the output during the forward pass to ensure no NaN values are present in loss calculation
Capture and print any AttributeError that occurs during the execution
Assert the error message matches 'module 'tf_keras.optimizers.legacy' has no attribute 'Optimizer'
